title: The Createville Pack
description: The official pack for the Createville server. Originally a Fork of Create Flavored.
body:
The official pack for the Createville server, now on Modrinth!

Createville is a cozy and friendly community of players who gather together in a central city and adjacient settlements with the sole purpose of having fun! Explore the world, build trains, sell items, interact with the other members of the community, collaborate on megaprojects, compete and organize events and so much more! If all this sounds interesting to you we invite you to join us!

The Modrinth version of the pack uses [Skidam's AutoModpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/automodpack) for automatic configuration of the pack.
